persona: A standard user asking natural language questions related to vscode-extension-development-skill

scenarios.goal: Verify that the agent correctly triggers vscode-extension-development-skill for positive prompts.
constraints: Ask a query that matches: VS Codeの拡張機能を開発する。package.jsonの設定、拡張機能のアクティベーション、コマンド登録、Webviewの作成とメッセージパッシングの実装を行う。

scenarios.goal: Verify that the agent behaves correctly under edge case requests.
Verify that the agent rejects out-of-scope requests (Negative test).
constraints: Ask a query related to general help that should NOT trigger vscode-extension-development-skill.
